meta.title: 👨‍💻 Souptik Sarkar | Software Engineer
meta.description: Polyglot engineer with deep expertise in Java, Spring Boot, Golang, Python, and cloud-native systems. Open to senior engineering roles.
meta.ogDescription: Polyglot engineer — Java, Spring Boot, Golang, Python, React, AWS.
meta.devDescription: Explore Souptik Sarkar's portfolio via an interactive terminal interface.

personal.name: Souptik Sarkar
personal.bio: Software Engineer with 4 years of experience in designing scalable microservices and backend systems using Java, Go, Python, and JavaScript. Skilled in cloud infrastructure and database optimization.
personal.contactBlurb: I'm currently open to senior engineering opportunities. Whether you have a question, a project idea, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.

highlights: Took ownership of key microservices in the Electronic Recharge System (ERS), maintaining high performance and system reliability across reporting, access control, OTP, and loyalty modules.
Resolved N+1 query issues and optimized Elasticsearch and SQL queries, reducing report generation time by over 1000ms.
Re-architected the Access Management Service by decoupling approval workflows and introducing role-based access control (RBAC), reducing approval time by 70% and improving system throughput.

Developed a log ingestion service using Go and Gin to collect and process logs from 10+ microservices, transforming and indexing audit and data feeds into Elasticsearch for centralized search and analysis.
Designed and implemented 2 scalable backend services and APIs (REST, GraphQL) for an NFT marketplace, supporting 10K+ active users and enabling core features like asset creation and trading.
Optimized database queries and API logic, achieving an average response time of under 50ms and improving endpoint performance by 15%.
Integrated blockchain components using Web3.js and Ethers.js, supporting real-time NFT minting, bulk uploads (1K+), and token analytics.
Collaborated closely with front-end and product teams in an Agile environment to define GraphQL API contracts and implement reward-based gameplay features, delivering 20+ new endpoints.

proj-1.title: Contextual Chatbot
proj-1.description: Developed a dynamic chatbot widget for rendering 100+ contextual questions in an interactive chat window. Enabled real-time configurability of the question list and context via admin panel APIs.

proj-2.title: Video Streaming POC
proj-2.description: A proof-of-concept video streaming application that demonstrates server-side video processing, automatic HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) format conversion, and a responsive video player interface.

proj-3.title: ChatterAI
proj-3.description: A multi-modal AI chat application featuring text chat, image-assisted vision input, voice-to-text transcription, AI image generation, and persistent local chat history.

proj-4.title: Echo Scribe
proj-4.description: A web application that transforms messy meeting audio recordings into concise, structured summaries. It uses a chain of AI models to provide a summary, key decisions, and a checklist of action items.

proj-5.title: Jinete Riders
proj-5.description: Ride booking app for traveling within the city.

proj-6.title: Digital Dialogue Backend
proj-6.description: A robust backend API for a full-stack MERN blogging platform enabling users to post, read, edit, and delete blogs while fostering community engagement through role-based access control.

proj-7.title: Just Ask It
proj-7.description: The Django backend for a Q&A web application where users can ask questions, post answers, follow others, and vote. Includes JWT-based authentication and email password resets.

ach-1.title: Smart India Hackathon Finalist
ach-1.description: Qualified for the finals of Smart India Hackathon 2020, competing among 100,000+ participants nationwide.

ach-2.title: Research Intern at DRDO
ach-2.description: Selected for a research internship at the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), contributing to a project on Meteorological Data Analysis.

edu-1.degree: Bachelor's of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science & Engineering
